title: BluePack-
description: A lightweight Fabric Vanilla+ modpack for your SMP
body:
# BluePack-

This modpack tweaks Minecraft Survival with performance and a little bit of a better gameplay experience.

The modpack has performance mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), cosmetic mods like [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes), and mods with practical use like [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) and [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) for talking in-game with your friends if it is also installed on the server.
